messages.description: A list of messages comprising the conversation so far.

role.description: The role of the message author.

max_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate. Controls output length and cost.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Higher values produce more random output; lower values make it more focused and deterministic. Do not use together with top_p.

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling threshold. The model considers only tokens comprising the top top_p probability mass. Do not use together with temperature.

top_k.description: Sample from the top K most likely tokens at each step. Reduces low-probability outputs. Recommended for advanced use cases only.

stream.description: If true, the response will be streamed as server-sent events (SSE) as it is generated.

stop.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

frequency_penalty.description: Penalizes tokens based on their frequency in the text so far, reducing repetition.

presence_penalty.description: Penalizes tokens based on whether they have appeared in the text so far, encouraging the model to discuss new topics.

seed.description: If specified, the system will attempt deterministic sampling — repeated requests with the same seed and parameters should return the same result.

tools.description: A list of tools (functions) the model may call. Supports up to 128 functions.

name.description: The name of the function to call.

description.description: A description of what the function does.

parameters.description: The parameters the function accepts, described as a JSON Schema object.

anyOf.description: none — model will not call any tool. auto — model can pick between a message or tool call. required — model must call one or more tools.

tool_choice.description: Controls which tool (if any) the model calls.

response_format.description: Specifies the output format. Use {"type": "json_object"} to enable JSON mode, or {"type": "json_schema", "json_schema": {...}} for structured output.

effort.description: Reasoning effort level. Higher effort uses more tokens but produces better results for complex tasks.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of reasoning tokens. Cannot be used simultaneously with effort.

exclude.description: If true, reasoning tokens will be excluded from the response.

id.description: A unique identifier for the chat completion.

created.description: Unix timestamp of when the completion was created.

model.description: The model used for the completion.

content.example: The capital of France is Paris.

credits_used.description: The number of credits consumed during generation.

usd_spent.description: The total amount spent in USD.
